task.title: Implement agent-relay view <name> read-only stream client (#864 sub-1)

events.content: Reuse 'ws' npm package — already a dep: Reuse 'ws' npm package — already a dep

raw.question: Reuse 'ws' npm package — already a dep
raw.chosen: Reuse 'ws' npm package — already a dep
raw.reasoning: The SDK already uses 'ws' v8.18.3 for the broker WebSocket transport. No new deps needed.

events.content: DI-style command module with onSignal-based teardown: DI-style command module with onSignal-based teardown

raw.question: DI-style command module with onSignal-based teardown
raw.chosen: DI-style command module with onSignal-based teardown
raw.reasoning: Matches the project's testing.md convention; ExitSignal pattern lets us cleanly drive SIGINT in tests without actually exiting.

events.content: Pure-function chunk filter (extractMatchingChunk) exported separately: Pure-function chunk filter (extractMatchingChunk) exported separately

raw.question: Pure-function chunk filter (extractMatchingChunk) exported separately
raw.reasoning: Allows unit-testing the worker_stream filter without standing up a WebSocket or any I/O.

events.content: Skip fresh-attach snapshot rendering: Skip fresh-attach snapshot rendering

raw.question: Skip fresh-attach snapshot rendering
raw.reasoning: Issue says nice-to-have; ship in follow-up. dump-pty already covers the use case manually.

retrospective.summary: Added agent-relay view <name> read-only PTY stream CLI. WS-based with worker_stream filter, ANSI preserved, Ctrl+C clean exit. 24 unit tests. Reused 'ws' SDK dep.
